name: HeLa CCL-2 (human cervical carcinoma)
notes: Standard HeLa line; passage <30 recommended. Mycoplasma-free certificate provided.

name: Trehalose dihydrate 99%
notes: Cryoprotectant; prepare as 0.5-2 M stock in PBS, filter-sterilize before use.

name: DMSO dimethyl sulfoxide cell-culture grade
notes: Standard 10% v/v cryoprotectant control. Warm to 37C before adding to cells.

name: DMEM high glucose
notes: Base medium for HeLa and most adherent mammalian cell lines.

name: Fetal Bovine Serum heat-inactivated
notes: Use at 10% v/v in DMEM. Heat-inactivate at 56C for 30 min if not pre-treated.

name: Trypan Blue stain 0.4%
notes: Viability dye for hemocytometer counting. Mix 1:1 with cell suspension.

name: Trypsin-EDTA 0.25%
notes: For detachment of adherent HeLa cells. Incubate 3-5 min at 37C.

name: Penicillin-Streptomycin 10000 U/mL
notes: Add 1% v/v to complete medium. Broad-spectrum antibiotic coverage.

name: Cryovials 1.8 mL sterile
notes: Externally threaded for liquid nitrogen storage. Use 1 mL fill volume.

name: Mr. Frosty Freezing Container
notes: Filled with isopropanol for -1C/min controlled-rate cooling. Replace isopropanol every 3 runs. Programmatic CRF is alternative.

name: LIVE/DEAD Fixable Aqua Dead Cell Stain Kit
notes: Flow cytometry alternative to trypan blue for more precise viability quantitation. Use if flow cytometer is available.

name: Phosphate Buffered Saline PBS pH 7.4
notes: General-purpose wash buffer. Autoclave or filter-sterilize as needed.

name: 96-well flat-bottom cell culture plate TC-treated
notes: TC-treated, sterile. Use for post-thaw recovery and proliferation assays.

name: CellTiter-Glo Luminescent Cell Viability Assay
notes: ATP-based luminescence assay. More sensitive than trypan blue for low-viability conditions. Confirmatory assay.

name: L-Glutamine 200 mM 100x
notes: Add 1% v/v to DMEM. Essential amino acid for HeLa proliferation in prolonged culture.

name: Anti-Claudin-1 antibody rabbit monoclonal EPR7786
notes: Validated for WB and IHC. Dilute 1:1000 for WB. Detects tight junction protein claudin-1.

name: Anti-Occludin antibody rabbit polyclonal
notes: Secondary tight junction marker. WB recommended dilution 1:500. Claudin-1 is the primary marker.

name: C57BL/6J mice male 8-10 weeks
notes: Standard inbred strain for gut microbiome research. 5 mice per group minimum for statistical power.

name: Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG ATCC 53103
notes: LGG reference strain. Rehydrate per ATCC instructions. Dose: 1e9 CFU/day in PBS gavage.

name: FITC-Dextran 4 kDa
notes: Intestinal permeability marker. Oral gavage 600 mg/kg in PBS. Collect serum 4h post-gavage. Read at 485/528 nm.

name: MRS Broth de Man Rogosa Sharpe
notes: Standard growth medium for Lactobacillus species. Culture at 37C anaerobically.

name: MRS Agar plates
notes: For CFU counting of LGG in gavage stock and intestinal content.

name: RNeasy Mini Kit 50 preps
notes: RNA extraction from tissue. Homogenize intestinal tissue in RLT buffer with beta-ME before column.

name: iScript cDNA Synthesis Kit
notes: Reverse transcription of RNA to cDNA. Input: 1 ug RNA per 20 uL reaction.

name: SsoAdvanced Universal SYBR Green Supermix
notes: qPCR master mix. Use with MIQE-compliant assay design. Include no-template controls.

name: Mouse Claudin-1 qPCR primer pair
notes: PrimeTime qPCR primer pair for mouse Cldn1. Efficiency validated by IDT.

name: Mouse Occludin qPCR primer pair
notes: PrimeTime qPCR primer pair for mouse Ocln. Secondary tight junction marker.

name: Mouse GAPDH qPCR primer pair housekeeping control
notes: Reference gene for delta-delta-Ct normalization. Stable across gut tissue treatments.

name: Rodent standard chow 2018S Teklad
notes: 18% protein, 6% fat, 44% carbohydrate. Autoclavable. Standard control diet.

name: ZymoBIOMICS DNA Miniprep Kit 16S library prep
notes: DNA extraction from stool for 16S microbiome sequencing. Optional — add if microbiome composition is a secondary endpoint.

name: Hematoxylin and Eosin H&E Staining Kit
notes: For intestinal histology. Fix intestinal segments in 10% formalin before paraffin embedding.

name: Mouse IL-6 ELISA Kit
notes: Sandwich ELISA for murine IL-6. LLOQ: 4 pg/mL. Secondary endpoint for inflammatory status.

name: Mouse TNF-alpha ELISA Kit
notes: Sandwich ELISA for murine TNF-alpha. Run alongside IL-6 for comprehensive cytokine panel.

name: Anti-CRP monoclonal antibody clone CRP-8
notes: Capture antibody for CRP biosensor. Pair with rabbit anti-CRP for detection.

name: CRP Human ELISA Kit high-sensitivity
notes: Sandwich ELISA. LLOQ: 0.05 mg/L. Gold standard reference method for biosensor validation.

name: Screen-printed carbon electrode strips SPE
notes: 3-electrode system: working, reference, counter. Modify working electrode with antibody.

name: EDC 1-ethyl-3-(3-dimethylaminopropyl)carbodiimide HCl
notes: Crosslinker for antibody conjugation to COOH-functionalized surfaces. Prepare fresh.

name: NHS N-hydroxysuccinimide
notes: Used with EDC for stable amide bond formation.

name: Bovine Serum Albumin BSA fraction V
notes: Blocking agent. 1% BSA in PBS for biosensor blocking step, 30 min at RT.

name: Human CRP recombinant protein standard curve
notes: Calibration standard. Prepare serial dilutions from 0.01-10 mg/L in pooled human serum.

name: Whatman Grade 4 filter paper 150mm
notes: Substrate for paper-based biosensor fabrication. 20-25 um pore size.

name: Potassium ferricyanide K3[Fe(CN)6]
notes: Electrochemical redox probe. 5 mM in PBS/KCl for EIS and CV characterization.

name: Potassium ferrocyanide K4[Fe(CN)6]
notes: Use equimolar with ferricyanide for Fe(II)/Fe(III) redox couple in electrolyte.

name: Gold nanoparticles 20 nm citrate-capped
notes: Signal amplification. Conjugate with anti-CRP antibody via thiol or NHS coupling.

name: Pooled human EDTA whole blood anonymized
notes: For sensor matrix testing. Spike with known CRP concentrations. Store at 4C, use within 24h.

name: Nafion 5% solution in lower aliphatic alcohols
notes: Protective membrane for electrode. Cast thin film, dry 30 min at 60C.

name: Potassium chloride KCl 99%
notes: Supporting electrolyte at 0.1 M in PBS for electrochemical measurements.

name: Potassium phosphate monobasic KH2PO4
notes: Buffer component. Combine with dibasic phosphate for 0.1 M PBS at pH 7.4.

name: Sporomusa ovata DSM 2662
notes: Acetogenic bacterium for bioelectrochemical CO2 fixation. Strictly anaerobic. Handle in glovebox.

name: Indigo carmine reducing agent anaerobic media
notes: Redox indicator for anaerobic medium. Turns colourless below -200 mV vs SHE when reduced.

name: Carbon cloth electrode AvCarb P50
notes: Cathode material for bioelectrochemical system. High surface area, hydrophilic.

name: Titanium wire 0.5 mm current collector
notes: Corrosion-resistant current collector. Connect to potentiostat working electrode terminal.

name: Ag/AgCl reference electrode saturated KCl
notes: +197 mV vs SHE. Apply -597 mV vs Ag/AgCl to achieve -400 mV vs SHE.

name: Platinum wire counter electrode 10 cm
notes: Inert counter electrode for 3-electrode BES setup.

name: Nafion 117 proton-exchange membrane
notes: Separates anode and cathode chambers in H-cell BES. Pre-treat in 5% H2SO4.

name: CO2 gas cylinder 99.9% purity 10L
notes: Carbon source for Sporomusa. Sparge catholyte at 20 mL/min continuously.

name: Megazyme Acetic Acid Assay Kit acetate test
notes: Enzymatic assay for acetate quantification. LLOQ 0.3 mg/L. Primary outcome measure for CO2 fixation.

name: Bio-Rad Aminex HPX-87H HPLC column organic acids
notes: For acetate, formate and succinate quantification by HPLC. Mobile phase: 5 mM H2SO4 at 0.6 mL/min, 35C.

name: HEPES buffer 1 M solution
notes: pH buffer for BES medium. Maintain pH 7.0 +/- 0.2 throughout electrosynthesis.

name: Sodium bicarbonate NaHCO3 99%
notes: Carbonate source and pH buffer. 50 mM in BES medium as CO2 substitute when sparging not feasible.

name: Ethanol 200 proof molecular biology grade
notes: General use: RNA precipitation, surface sterilization, column washing.

name: Syringe filter 0.22 um PVDF sterile
notes: Sterile filtration of reagents. Use for all solutions going into cell culture.

name: Bio-Rad Bradford Protein Assay Reagent
notes: Colorimetric protein quantitation for WB loading normalization. BCA is an alternative.

name: Nitrocellulose membrane 0.45 um Western blot
notes: For Western blot analysis of claudin-1 and occludin protein expression.

name: Anti-rabbit IgG HRP secondary antibody
notes: HRP-conjugated. Use at 1:5000 in 5% milk/TBST. For claudin-1 and occludin WB.

name: ECL Western Blotting Substrate
notes: Chemiluminescence detection for HRP. Mix A and B 1:1 immediately before use.

name: PageRuler Prestained Protein Ladder 10-180 kDa
notes: Pre-stained MW marker for SDS-PAGE and WB orientation.

name: NuPAGE 4-12% Bis-Tris Protein Gels
notes: Pre-cast gradient gel. Resolves claudin-1 (23 kDa) and occludin (65 kDa).

name: Eppendorf tubes 1.5 mL DNA/RNA-free sterile
notes: General use. Autoclave-stable.

name: Parafilm M laboratory sealing film
notes: General lab sealing film.

name: Liquid nitrogen facility charge per litre
notes: Long-term cryopreservation. Budget ~200L for a 6-week cryopreservation study.

name: Tween-20 polyoxyethylene sorbitan monolaurate
notes: Surfactant for WB blocking 0.1% in TBS and ELISA wash buffer.

name: Formaldehyde solution 37% formalin
notes: Tissue fixative. Use 10% neutral buffered formalin for intestinal histology.

name: RIPA lysis buffer
notes: Cell and tissue lysis for protein extraction. Supplement with protease inhibitor cocktail.

name: Halt Protease Inhibitor Cocktail 100x
notes: Add 1x to RIPA buffer during lysis. Inhibits serine, cysteine, aspartic, and metalloproteases.

name: DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit 50 preps
notes: Genomic DNA extraction. Use if microbiome or genomic endpoints are included.

name: Fluorescence microplate reader compatible 96-well
notes: Equipment time charge. Required for FITC-dextran, ELISA, and viability assays.

name: Confocal microscope slide chamber
notes: For imaging of claudin-1 and occludin localization by immunofluorescence.

name: Normal donkey serum blocking agent
notes: 5% in PBS for IHC/IF blocking. Prevents non-specific secondary antibody binding.

name: ProLong Gold Antifade Mountant with DAPI
notes: Mounting medium for fluorescence imaging. DAPI labels nuclei (blue, 460 nm).

name: Goat anti-rabbit Alexa Fluor 488 secondary
notes: Fluorescent secondary for rabbit primaries (claudin-1, occludin). Use at 1:500.

name: Sterile gavage needle 20G x 50mm mouse
notes: Oral gavage needle for probiotic and FITC-dextran delivery. 20G for adult C57BL/6.

name: Micro blood collection tubes EDTA 0.5 mL
notes: For serum collection from mouse tail vein or cardiac puncture post FITC-dextran gavage.

name: Hydrogen gas cylinder 99.9% 2L
notes: H2 as alternative electron donor for Sporomusa in control experiments.

name: Potentiostat Biologic SP-50 rental day
notes: Chronoamperometry and EIS. Equipment hire charge. Software EC-Lab included.

name: Propidium iodide PI viability dye 1mg/mL
notes: Dead cell marker for flow cytometry. Add 1 uL per 1 mL cell suspension. Do not fix cells.

name: Falcon 15mL and 50mL conical tubes sterile
notes: Standard conical centrifuge tubes. RNase/DNase-free.

name: NanoDrop spectrophotometer RNA/DNA quant chip
notes: RNA/DNA purity check before qPCR. Require A260/A280 >1.8 for RNA.

name: Nuclease-free water molecular biology grade
notes: For all RNA work and qPCR setup. Treat water as RNase-contaminated if not certified.

name: Autoclaved ultrapure water MilliQ system use
notes: Resistivity >18 MOhm.cm. Required for all electrochemical buffer preparation.

name: Caco-2 HTB-37 (human colorectal adenocarcinoma)
notes: Intestinal epithelial model. Differentiate 21 days post-confluence on Transwell. Achieves TEER >300 Ohm.cm2.

name: Millicell ERS-2 TEER measurement system
notes: Trans-epithelial electrical resistance meter. Measures barrier integrity in Transwell inserts. Read at 37C.

name: Corning Transwell polycarbonate inserts 0.4 um 24-well
notes: Polycarbonate membrane 0.4 um pore. Seed Caco-2 at 5e4 cells/insert. Differentiate 21 days.

name: EMEM Eagle's Minimum Essential Medium
notes: Recommended basal medium for Caco-2 cells per ATCC guidelines. Supplement with 20% FBS.

name: Lactobacillus acidophilus ATCC 4356
notes: Type strain for multi-species probiotic cocktail experiments. Culture on MRS at 37C anaerobically.

name: Bifidobacterium longum ATCC 15707
notes: Reference Bifidobacterium for probiotic cocktail. Culture on MRS + 0.05% cysteine at 37C anaerobically.

name: Bifidobacterium breve ATCC 15700
notes: 4th strain in probiotic cocktail (HYPO-006). Strictly anaerobic Bifidobacterium.

name: LPS lipopolysaccharide from E. coli O111:B4
notes: Systemic inflammatory challenge. IP injection 5 mg/kg in sterile PBS. Highly potent endotoxin — handle with care.

name: PDMS Sylgard 184 silicone elastomer kit
notes: Microfluidic channel fabrication. Mix 10:1 base:curing agent. Cure 1h at 70C or 24h at RT.

name: Ferrocene methanol redox reference standard
notes: Redox reference for electrochemical calibration. E1/2 = +0.40 V vs NHE in aqueous. Use 1 mM in 0.1 M KCl.

name: Succinic acid disodium salt HPLC standard
notes: HPLC calibration standard for succinate quantification (HYPO-008). Prepare 0.1-50 mM standards in 5 mM H2SO4.

name: Resazurin sodium salt anaerobic viability indicator
notes: Redox indicator for anaerobic media quality (pink = oxidized/contaminated, colourless = reduced/anaerobic). Use 0.001% w/v.

name: Annexin V-FITC Apoptosis Detection Kit
notes: Distinguishes early apoptosis (Annexin V+/PI-) from necrosis (Annexin V+/PI+). Requires flow cytometer.

name: LDH Cytotoxicity Assay Kit
notes: Colorimetric LDH release assay for membrane damage. Alternative viability endpoint. Read at 490 nm.

name: Human Claudin-1 qPCR primer pair
notes: Human CLDN1 PrimeTime primer pair for Caco-2 or overexpression studies (HYPO-005).

name: Human GAPDH qPCR primer pair housekeeping control
notes: Human GAPDH housekeeping reference gene for normalization in Caco-2 studies.
